summary_en: NADEX completed acquisition of 194,500 common shares (2.2% of outstanding) for ¥199.9M via TSE market purchase from December 10, 2025 to May 15, 2026, with full cancellation scheduled for June 26, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Treasury Stock Acquisition Status, Completion of Acquisition, and Treasury Stock Cancellation
translation_en_brief: On May 18, 2026, NADEX CO.,LTD. (TSE Standard, Code 7435) announced the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program and disclosed the final cancellation details. The company acquired a total of 194,500 common shares representing 2.2% of outstanding shares for ¥199,933,000 through open market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between December 10, 2025 and May 15, 2026. This acquisition was conducted pursuant to a board resolution dated December 9, 2025, under which the company had authorized acquisition of up to 230,000 shares (2.7% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) within a ¥200 million budget limit through May 29, 2026. All acquired shares are scheduled for cancellation on June 26, 2026, reducing the issued share count from 8,800,500 to 8,606,000 shares. The acquisition has been completed ahead of the originally authorized period.
